# DaytonGrowthCo.

> DaytonGrowthCo helps Dayton-area businesses set up cleaner websites, smarter lead capture, booking flows, follow-up tools, and simple lead organization systems without requiring a monthly contract.

## Primary Website

- Homepage: https://www.daytongrowth.co/
- Full demo: https://www.daytongrowth.co/watson-roofing
- Contact: help@daytongrowth.co
- Service area: Dayton, Ohio and the Miami Valley

## Core Positioning

DaytonGrowthCo provides one-time website and lead system setup for local businesses. The work focuses on practical systems around a business website: clear calls to action, contact or quote forms, booking links, notifications, auto-responses, simple lead tracking, and follow-up workflows.

## Packages

- Website Setup: a mobile-friendly website with clear calls to action, contact or quote form setup, basic local SEO, and launch support.
- Lead System Setup: improved forms, lead notifications, customer auto-response, booking link setup, simple lead tracking, and full lead-flow testing.
- Website + Lead System: a website plus the lead capture and follow-up setup needed to keep new inquiries organized.

## Example Tools

- Smart quote request forms
- Appointment and booking flows
- Missed-call text-back systems
- Lead dashboards
- Customer intake flows
- Follow-up reminders
- Estimate portal demos for service businesses that need that style of workflow

## Best Fit Customers

- Contractors
- Roofers
- Auto shops
- Law firms
- Med spas
- Landscapers
- Salons
- Clinics
- Nonprofits
- Local service businesses

## Important Concepts

- Dayton Ohio website setup
- Lead capture setup
- Local business website
- Booking setup
- Website forms
- Customer follow-up
- Lead organization
- Google Business Profile cleanup
